meta.title: NavDhan: Business Loans for India's MSMEs
meta.description: Get ₹5L to ₹1Cr business loans. One application, multiple offers, zero platform fee.

hero.eyebrow: Fast business loans for India's MSMEs
hero.headline: One stop-solution for all your working capital needs
hero.body: Aap business badhayein, hum funding sambhalte hain. Fast, transparent, and digital loans designed for MSMEs.

FinVision.title: FinVision
FinVision.description: FinVision 2026 Award Winner at NIBM, Pune (RBI think-tank)

FACE.title: FACE Registered
FACE.description: Member of Fintech Association for Consumer Empowerment

loanProducts.heading: Tailored Business Financing
loanProducts.body: Simple, transparent term loans designed to give your enterprise the runway it needs to scale.

featured.title: Term Loans
featured.description: Flexible capital infusion for expansion, equipment purchase, or managing seasonal cash flow variations.

products.descriptionKey: Unsecured funding up to ₹1 Crore based on your business cash flow. No property or asset needed.
Cover salaries, stock, supplier payments, or everyday gaps with flexible repayment.
Buy equipment, vehicles, or tools with EMIs that match your cash cycle.
Larger-ticket capital to expand to a new city, add capacity, or take on bigger orders.

whyNavDhan.heading: Why Choose NavDhan?
whyNavDhan.body: Built on trust, designed for speed. We remove the friction from business financing.

reasons.bodyKey: Disbursement takes around 24-72 hours depending on the lender's timeline.
Bank-grade encryption ensures your business data remains completely private and protected.
Transparent interest rates with absolutely zero hidden charges or surprise fees.
A completely digital journey. Upload basic documents and let our systems do the rest.
Dedicated relationship managers available round the clock to assist your queries.
Choose repayment schedules that align perfectly with your business cash flows.

recognition.heading: Built to earn your trust. Recognised along the way.

emiCalculator.heading: Plan Your Finances
emiCalculator.intro: Use our interactive calculator to estimate your monthly commitments. Adjust the sliders to find a plan that works for your cash flow.

finalCta.heading: Ready to grow your business?
finalCta.subtext: Join 500+ successful enterprises scaling with NavDhan's working capital solutions.

meta.title: Our Team: NavDhan
meta.description: Meet the people building fair, fast business loans for India's MSMEs.

hero.heading: Built by people who believe in small business.
hero.subtext: We are builders, engineers, designers, and operators working to make MSME credit calm, clear, and honest.

mission.heading: Calm, credible credit for every small business.
mission.body: We believe MSMEs deserve a lending experience that is honest, respectful, and fast. NavDhan exists to make that the default.

items.title: Empathy
items.body: We design around real borrower worries, not lender convenience.

items.title: Transparency
items.body: No hidden fees, no jargon. Plain terms you can verify.

items.title: Speed
items.body: Decisions move quickly because our systems do the heavy lifting.

debayan-gupta.contribution: Advises on research-led technology choices and academic partnerships.

join.heading: Want to shape the future of MSME credit?
join.subtext: We are always looking for thoughtful people who care about building fair financial products.

meta.title: Apply: NavDhan
meta.description: Check your business loan eligibility in under 5 minutes.

apply.heading: Get the right business loan, without chasing banks.
apply.description: Fill a few details to check your eligibility. It takes less than 5 minutes.
apply.aadhaarConsentLabel: I agree to Aadhaar OTP-based eKYC
apply.itrConsentLabel: I confirm this is my latest ITR
apply.bankConsentLabel: I consent to fetch bank statements
apply.privacyConsentLabel: I agree to the Privacy Policy
apply.termsConsentLabel: I agree to the Terms of Use
apply.creditConsentLabel: I consent to a credit bureau check
apply.communicationConsentLabel: I consent to receive communication from NavDhan
apply.emiNoteTemplate: Total payable {total} @ 18% p.a. This is only an estimate.
apply.consentLender: I consent to sharing my details so NavDhan can find a loan offer for my business.
apply.successBody: We have received your application. A NavDhan advisor will reach out within 24 hours.
apply.errorBody: Please check your details and try again.

validation.mobileInvalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.pinCodeInvalid: Please enter a valid 6-digit PIN code.
validation.nameInvalid: Please enter a valid full name.
validation.amountInvalid: Please enter a valid loan amount.
validation.aadhaarInvalid: Please enter a valid 12-digit Aadhaar number.
validation.panInvalid: Please enter a valid PAN number.
validation.itrInvalid: Please upload a valid PDF up to 10 MB.

wizard.submissionSuccessBody: Thank you! Your application has been submitted successfully.
